authentication.notes: Cookie-based auth, httpOnly smartup_session, proxy auto-injects token

student_admission.notes: Full CRUD. Admission creates Guardian → Student → Program Enrollment → Student Group membership → Auto Sales Order. Blood group is enum dropdown.

sales_module.notes: Full CRUD + submit/cancel. Auto-SO on admission. Rate auto-fills from Item Price table.

proxy.notes: Native fetch (not axios) to avoid Expect header. Debug logging for non-200.

frappe_doctype.name: Student Attendance
frappe_doctype.workflow_notes: Student Attendance is NOT submittable in Frappe Education. It saves directly (docstatus stays 0).

bulk_api.notes: This whitelisted method creates/updates attendance records for the entire group at once

steps.action: Replace static batch dropdown with live Student Groups
details: Import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
Import { getBatches } from '@/lib/api/batches'
Import { getBatch } from '@/lib/api/batches'
Query all batches for the user's branch: useQuery({ queryKey: ['batches-for-attendance', branch], queryFn: () => getBatches({ custom_branch: branch }) })
Populate <select> with real batch names
Default to first batch in list

steps.action: Load students from selected batch
details: When selectedBatch changes, fetch the batch detail: useQuery({ queryKey: ['batch-detail', selectedBatch], queryFn: () => getBatch(selectedBatch), enabled: !!selectedBatch })
Extract students from response.data.students child table
Initialize attendance state from these students
Remove mockStudentsInBatch array entirely

steps.action: Load existing attendance for selected date
details: Import { getAttendance } from '@/lib/api/attendance'
When date or batch changes, query: useQuery({ queryKey: ['attendance', selectedBatch, selectedDate], queryFn: () => getAttendance(selectedDate, { student_group: selectedBatch }) })
Pre-fill attendance state with existing records (so edits show prior data)
If no existing records, default all to 'Present'

steps.action: Wire save button to Frappe bulk attendance API
details: Import { bulkMarkAttendance } from '@/lib/api/attendance'
Import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
Create mutation: useMutation({ mutationFn: bulkMarkAttendance, onSuccess: () => { queryClient.invalidateQueries(['attendance']); toast.success(...) } })
Build payload from attendance state:
students_present = IDs where status === 'Present'
students_absent = IDs where status === 'Absent'
students_late = IDs where status === 'Late' (optional, may need to mark absent then update)
Note: Frappe's bulk API may not support 'Late' — check response. If not, mark individually via markAttendance().

steps.action: Add Attendance Report tab/view
details: Add a tab/toggle: 'Mark Attendance' vs 'View Report'
Report view: date range picker (from_date, to_date), optional batch filter
Call getAttendanceReport({ student_group, from_date, to_date })
Display table: Student Name | Total Days | Present | Absent | Late | Attendance %
Color-code: green ≥90%, yellow 75-90%, red <75%

frappe_api_calls.label: Get batch students

frappe_api_calls.label: Attendance report
frappe_api_calls.notes: Returns summary per student: total_days, present, absent, percentage

steps.action: Build /fees/structure page — list & create fee structures
details: LIST VIEW:
Query: getFeeStructures() — shows all 18 existing structures
Display: table with program, academic year, total amount, status (submitted/draft)
Each row links to detail view or is expandable to show components
CREATE VIEW (dialog or separate section):
Form: program (select), academic_year (select), receivable_account (text or select), company (select)
Components: dynamic list of { fees_category (select from Fee Categories), amount (number) }
Use feeStructureSchema validator
Call createFeeStructure() on submit
After create, need to submit: PUT /api/resource/Fee Structure/{name} { docstatus: 1 }
NOTE: Fee Structures are already created for all 18 programs — this page mostly displays existing ones

steps.action: Build /fees/payments page — record fee payments
details: SEARCH/SELECT: Student search autocomplete (use searchStudents from students.ts)
Once student selected, show their fee records (getFeeRecords({ student }))
FEE RECORD CREATION: If no fee record exists for the student, offer to create one:
Auto-fill: student, program_enrollment (from latest enrollment), fee_structure (based on program), company (branch), posting_date (today), due_date
Call createFeeRecord()
PAYMENT: Select fee record, enter amount, mode of payment, reference number
Call createPayment()
Use paymentSchema validator
PAYMENT MODES: Cash, Bank Transfer, UPI, Cheque, Card (from PAYMENT_MODES constant)
PAYMENT HISTORY: Show recent payments table at bottom

steps.action: Generate fee records in bulk (optional utility)
details: Since 0 fee records exist but 18 fee structures are defined,
consider a utility to batch-create fee records for all enrolled students
For each student with a submitted Program Enrollment:
Look up the Fee Structure matching their program + academic year
Create a Fees record: { student, program_enrollment, fee_structure, company, posting_date, due_date }
This is typically done via Frappe's Fee Schedule mechanism (but none exist yet)

data_fetching.pattern: useQuery({ queryKey: [...], queryFn: async () => { const res = await apiFunction(); return res.data ?? res; } })
data_fetching.mutation_pattern: useMutation({ mutationFn: apiFunction, onSuccess: () => { queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [...] }); toast.success('...'); }, onError: (err) => toast.error(err.message) })
data_fetching.notes: All API functions go through /api/proxy/[...path] which injects auth token

form_handling.pattern: const form = useForm<FormType>({ resolver: zodResolver(schema) as any })
form_handling.zod_v4_notes: Use 'message:' not 'required_error:'. Cast zodResolver() with 'as any' for z.coerce.number() fields.

loading_states.pattern: if (isLoading) return

error_handling.api_errors: Frappe returns { exc_type, _server_messages } — parse _server_messages JSON array for user-friendly message
error_handling.frappe_417: Frappe uses HTTP 417 for ValidationError — not HTTP Expect header issue
error_handling.child_table_doctype: Always include 'doctype' field on child table rows when POSTing

styling.framework: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
styling.animations: framer-motion for page transitions and staggered lists
styling.cards: Use Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent from src/components/ui/Card.tsx

feature_flags.pattern: const { flags } = useFeatureFlagsStore(); if (!flags.moduleName) return null;

known_gotchas.context: When POSTing docs with child tables (e.g. Student with guardians, Fee Structure with components)
known_gotchas.solution: Always include { doctype: 'ChildTableDoctype', ...otherFields } on every child row

known_gotchas.issue: Frappe 417 = ValidationError, not HTTP Expect header
known_gotchas.context: Frappe returns HTTP 417 for validation errors. The proxy was initially changed to fix a perceived HTTP issue, but 417 was actually Frappe's validation error.
known_gotchas.solution: Parse the response body for _server_messages to get the actual validation error

known_gotchas.issue: Blood group is a Frappe Select field
known_gotchas.solution: Use dropdown with exact values, validate with z.enum()

known_gotchas.issue: Program abbreviation hyphens vs full words
known_gotchas.context: Programs use '10th 1-1' but item codes use '10th 1 to 1 Tuition Fee'
known_gotchas.solution: getTuitionFeeItem() normalizes: replace '1-1' → '1 to 1', '1-M' → '1 to M'

known_gotchas.issue: Frappe auto-creates Customer on Student insert
known_gotchas.context: Student after_insert hook creates a linked Customer. Don't create a second one.
known_gotchas.solution: Read back student.customer field after creation instead of calling createCustomer

known_gotchas.issue: Item list queries need stock_uom not uom
known_gotchas.context: Frappe rejects 'uom' in Item list field queries

known_gotchas.issue: delivery_date required by SO validate hook
known_gotchas.context: Schema says reqd=0 but Sales Order validate() requires it
known_gotchas.solution: Always include delivery_date in Sales Order payload

known_gotchas.issue: Fee Structure must be submitted before use
known_gotchas.context: Fee records reference Fee Structure — it must be docstatus=1
known_gotchas.solution: After creating, PUT { docstatus: 1 } to submit. All 18 existing structures are already submitted.

known_gotchas.issue: Program Enrollment must be submitted for Fees
known_gotchas.context: Fee record requires a submitted Program Enrollment (docstatus=1)
known_gotchas.solution: The admitStudent() flow already submits the enrollment (draft → submit)

known_gotchas.issue: GCC branch uses student-named Student Groups
known_gotchas.context: GCC 1-to-1 students have groups named after students (e.g. 'ADAM YOOSUF') instead of standard CHL-prog-YY-seq pattern
known_gotchas.solution: Filter by group_based_on='Batch' and custom_branch to handle both patterns
Treat 0 as 'unlimited' in UI, or use MAX_BATCH_CAPACITY constant (60) as fallback

get.returns: Full document with all fields and child tables

create.notes: Child tables must include 'doctype' field on each row

update.body: JSON object with fields to update
